case_title: ADRIANA D. CAMPOS ADAME VS. JOSEPH DUENAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S NEW ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT DUENAS, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS ADAME, ADRIANA D. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS ADAME, ADRIANA D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUENAS, JOSEPH $550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAMPOS ADAME, ADRIANA D. AS TO DEFENDANT DUENAS, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE BY DAVID ANTHONY GRONER FOR GMAC INSURANCE.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
